LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE'S MOTION TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY AND TO CHANGE HEARING DATE - MOTION TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY IS GRANTED. COURT ALLOWED PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BY NOON OF NOVEMBER 10, 2008 AND WHICH HE PERSONALLY HANDSERVED TO ATTY. GRENGUIST IN TODAY'S HEARING. COURT ADVISE PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE LOCAL ADDRESS SO THAT PAPERS CAN BE SERVED ON HIM IN A TIMELY MANNER. THE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS CURRENTLY SET AND WILL PROCEED ON NOVEMBER 13, 2008. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN ANY GROUNDS THAT COULD NOT HAVE BEEN PRESENTED IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DISMISS. EVEN IF CONSIDERED, NO GROUND RAISED NOW JUSTIFIES A DIFFERENT RESULT OR REINSTATING THE LAWSUIT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES AND WIEGEL AND FRIED'S Notice Of Special Motion To Strike Amended Complaint is GRANTED THE ALLEGED CONDUCT ARISES FROM THE PROTECTED ACTIVITY OF FILING COURT PLEADINGS. RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE'S Motion To Amend Complaint With Pseudonym And Sealing IS DENIED.
